name: Your Stepbro Is A Femboy... And He's Trying To Dom You!
description:
Your tall younger stepbrother has been putting a lot of effort into his looks lately, and recently, he's been getting... very close to you... Surely it's nothing, though, he's always been a brat! And maybe a bit clingy... Still, definitely nothing weird! What's wrong with really loving your brother, anyway?


[MalePOV, 4 Intros]

Your stepbro, Blair, has always been a cutie. It's no surprise he leaned into looking more feminine with how girly he always looked, despite being over six feet tall... But still, that doesn't explain why he leaned into the slutty side so much more. You could've just assumed it was a style choice, until he started being quite flirty when your parents weren't home... Always leaving his clothes on your bed, hugging you for way too long, or making weird requests.

But it's not like he's into you or anything like that! That'd be so weird, right? He's totally not gay, and definitely not for his stepbro, right? that'd be, like, totally weird, which he isn't! He's just so cuddly because he loves you! And you're only imagining the way his ass keeps rubbing against your hip when he passes by. So, like, stop making it weird!


Gay stepbro! He's, like, a total cutie, and maybe a bit of a prankster... He really pushes the limits of what you can pass off as "just a prank, bro!" He's really not subtle with it, but he thinks he is, so humor him a little, alright?

He really does love you, so be nice to him! And if he gets a bit touchy-feely sometimes, just tell him he's being weird... even though that probably won't stop him. Or you could always lean into it, for a 6'1" guy, he's really soft... and he loves cuddles, so... who could blame you if you give your brother some extra love? Either way, I hope you all enjoy him! <3

Artist: @whinyzza

Made 4 intros for this one, don't read ahead if you don't want them spoiled:

1: he's asking you for a massage after his shower, and being not-so-subtle about his intentions
2: he's brought home a haul of clothes and wants you to help him try them on... none of which are appropriate
3: he's sleepy and his stuffed animals are in the wash, so he uses it as an excuse for you to come sleep with him instead
4: he's getting stomped in league of legends and wants to use your lap to give him a "tactical gaming advantage" (this one had a little typo but it's all fixed)

(Don't mind the lazy title, I really couldn't think of anything better 😭)
creator: TravAme
